judgeScores.justification: The implementation features clean, well-documented code with comprehensive testing (72 tests) and useful extras like aggregation methods, but fails critical requirements: it cannot handle newlines within quoted fields (architecturally flawed by splitting on line separators before parsing) and lacks streaming support for large files. It also uses `any` types instead of proper generics and over-delivers with 10 files of documentation rather than the requested 2-file implementation.
